title: Wood Slices 50 Pcs 7-8cm Natural Wood Slices Unfinished Wood Craft Kit Predrilled Log Slice Wooden Circles Tree Slice for DIY Crafts Arts Painting Christmas Ornaments
features: Natural Wood Slices: 50 Pcs wood slices with bark is 3.1 inches (8 cm) in diameter and thickness is 0.19 inches (0.5 cm). Each wooden slices is predrilled with a small hole and equipped with 9.8 feet of jute rope, allowing you to easily hang and decorate the Christmas tree
High-quality Wooden Circles: Compared with ordinary log slices, we adopt advanced techniques and use scientific control of moisture ratio in wood slices, to prevent the wood from drying or cracking

Wood Slices for Crafts and Arts: Our wood ornament slices are natural pine solid wood chips. Each unfinished wooden decoration has been polished to make the surface smooth and safe enough for painting or writing

Various Occasions: Wood ornaments are perfect for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, festivals and New Year. As a a daily home decoration, the unfinished log wooden circles will become exquisite decorations for Christmas trees, windows, fireplaces, and staircase handrails
description: Product Description 50Pcs 6-8cm Natural Wood Slices for You to Decorate Home Natural Pine Wood Material - Unfinished pine solid wooden slices with bark let you enjoy the beauty of the forest. Predrilled small hole and attached jute rope for easy hanging. Advanced Drying Technology - We adopt advanced technology to scientifically control the proportion of moisture ratio in wood slices, to prevent the wood from drying or cracking. Well-polished & Smooth Surface - Each unfinished wooden circles has been polished to make the surface smooth and safe enough for painting or writing. Natural Material & Perfect Size wood slices are made from natural pine wood with bark, a little part of wood bark may fall from the slices. 2.36-3.1 inches (6-8 cm) in diameter and 0.19 inches (0.5 cm) thick. This allows you to fully use your imagination, enrich the decoration of Christmas trees and fireplaces, and let you spend a different holiday. DIY Craft Projects Wedding Decorations The cute and personalized log slices are suitable for a country-themed wedding. These wooden decorations will be great souvenirs to commemorate your special day. These rustic wood chips are perfect for outdoor woodland or barn parties or weddings. Christmas Tree Ornaments Pine chips are very suitable for decorating Christmas trees. A small hole is prepared on each log. You can use twine to hang it in different places in your home. It is a charming and rustic decoration on the Christmas tree! Home Accessories Log chips can meet your needs as home decoration. The exquisite wood chips after DIY always look great at your home or office, and every different pattern attracts people's attention. Wooden Christmas Ornaments are suitable for holiday and home decorations, such as weddings, baby showers, birthdays and New Years. The round wooden discs will become exquisite decorations for Christmas trees, windows, fireplaces and stair rails. You can use round wood chips to decorate your gift box and Christmas tree, but it is also fun to design wood chip patterns yourself. Will make the gift more unique.
